author: GameSpot YouTube
text:
Deadpool References You Probably Missed In Marvel Tokon: Fighting Souls
Deadpool has always left references for fans to hunt down in every media he's in, but this time it's more geared towards fighting games in his recent announcement in MARVEL Tōkon: Fighting Souls. We get to the bottom of almost all of them.

author: GameSpot YouTube
text:
Doom: The Dark Ages | Revelations Spear Rules!
Here's what we learned about Doom: The Dark Ages | Revelations from our latest preview. One of Doom: The Dark Ages’ biggest changes was the introduction of a shield in your left hand, which was how you exploited enemy weaknesses, opening the way to deal damage with the weapon in your right hand. And now you can swap between the shield and, a spear! Like the shield, the spear is both defense and offense – “all the thinking is still done in your left hand,” Martin said.

#doom #doomthedarkages #gaming
